checks.title: External HTTP service-node load preflight
checks.command: gh workflow run external-http-cluster-load.yml -f nodes="$WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES" -f batch_query_size=24 -f commit_results=true
issues: cluster node requires at least 4 URLs
warnings: WAVEMIND_API_KEY is not set; only use this if the target endpoints are intentionally unauthenticated

checks.title: External HTTP active-active regions preflight
checks.command: gh workflow run external-http-active-active.yml -f regions="$WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS" -f commit_results=true
issues: active-active region requires at least 3 URLs
warnings: WAVEMIND_API_KEY is not set; only use this if the target endpoints are intentionally unauthenticated

checks.title: Managed/serverless remote telemetry preflight
checks.command: gh workflow run serverless-observed-telemetry.yml -f nodes="$WAVEMIND_SERVERLESS_NODES" -f seed_mode=first -f commit_results=true
issues: serverless node requires at least 1 URLs
warnings: WAVEMIND_API_KEY is not set; only use this if the target endpoints are intentionally unauthenticated

checks.title: 10M pgvector service load preflight
checks.evidence: workflow-provisioned four-service pgvector topology; external DSNs optional; plan benchmarks/production_streaming_load_pgvector_10m_plan.json
checks.command: gh workflow run production-streaming-load.yml --ref main -f engine=pgvector-service -f size=10000000 -f dim=128 -f queries=2000 -f top_k=10 -f batch_size=5000 -f target_recall=0.95 -f target_p99_ms=100 -f target_qps=100 -f replicas=3 -f autoscaling_max_replicas=24 -f capacity_headroom=0.7 -f runner_label=ubuntu-latest -f provision_pgvector_shards=true -f pgvector_shard_count=4 -f pgvector_profile=ivfflat-fine-production -f runner_storage_root=state -f commit_results=true
warnings: Ephemeral isolated service processes prove the 10M candidate-index SLO, not PostgreSQL HA or independent-node failure tolerance.
